title: TRIBAL HOUSING - 211info
text: GOVERNMENT OFFICE TRIBAL HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides affordable rental housing. 1245 Fulton Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Must be enrolled in a federally recognized tribe and families who are low-income Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 888-9577 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 888-9577 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information. The Florence units have a preference for Tribal members who are employed by a Tribal entity. FEES: Varies by unit; households pay 20% gross income towards rent DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Cities of Coos Bay, Florence, and North Bend Services: Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - DOWN PAYMENT LOAN ASSISTANCE PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY ASSISTANCE/HOMELESS PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - HOME REPAIR PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - RENTAL ASSISTANCE INFORMATION SERVICES - TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CIRCLES OF HEALING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GOVERNMENT OFFICE
